title: Review round 1: 1s0 Chat methods
notes: SEC1 verdict: Three real issues found. (1) jmap-chat-tui-3bs.9: No test exercises chat_set_update with addMembers.role set, so the Result-collection/serde_json::to_value path is untested. (2) jmap-chat-tui-3bs.11: AddMemberInput and UpdateMemberRoleInput use hand-rolled serde_json::json! in chat.rs rather than derived Serialize; adding a new field to either struct will compile without error but silently omit the new field from the wire payload — no compiler guidance. (3) jmap-chat-tui-3bs.12: ChatUpdateInput.message_expiry_seconds is Option<u64> (not Option<Option<u64>>), so there is no path to clear the field once set; this is consistent with the spec (UnsignedInt, not nullable) but is not documented in the struct comment, creating a trap for future maintainers who compare it to the nullable fields above it. Non-issues: ChatMemberRole and ChatKind both carry #[non_exhaustive] correctly; Option<Option<T>> pattern is documented at struct level; TypingResponse is adequately documented with a spec reference.
